title: Shows your real health, unrounded
description: Minecraft will always round your health but, with TruHealth, you always see your real health.

title: Shows absorption too
description: When absorption is active (golden apple etc.), the overlay extends with `+ N` in gold so you see the hidden float behind the gold hearts.

title: Does not hide armor and absorption rows
description: The overlay automatically moves to avoid overlapping the vanilla HUD.
